title: Sabatier Professional Nylon Serving Spoon - by Taylors Eye Witness. Anti-Scratch for Non-Stick Pans. Dishwasher Safe. Stainless Steel Core and Handle. 25 Year Guarantee. Ideal Cooking Spoon.
features: ✅ PERFECT PERFORMANCE: Handy for stews, hot pots, casseroles and rice. Will not bend while trying to lift heavy food stuff due to the thick, solid nylon bowl of the spoon. The nylon will preserve the life of your non-stick pots, pans and pressure cookers as it doesn't remove the coating. Solid stainless steel core with strong handle. Lightweight but well-balanced. Sturdy , thick and inflexible head demonstrates the quality. Can be used as cooking spoon. Stain- and heat-resistant.

✅ CHOICE FOR PROFESSIONALS WORLDWIDE: Due to outstanding quality, unrivaled performance, ease of use, effortless cleaning, durability and longevity! Sabatier is over 150 years old, with its roots in Thiers, France. That's a lot of experience in producing kitchen utensils. Trust in the Sabatier Professional series. Available tools: can opener, garlic press, peeler, ladle, turner, masher, whisk, spoon, skimmer, mini sieve, pizza wheel, slotted turner, grater & zester, fish slice.

✅ HANDLE: Kitchen life is easier when you have the right tool for the task. A lot of time and effort, trial and error has gone into making this range the most perfect yet. Each one has strong, hardened stainless steel, construction handles. The roundness feels smooth and comfortable in your hand. The carefully weighted handles provide good balance so your hand won't tire out from repetitive kitchen tasks. The smart design has loops at the ends of the handles, suiting all storage options.

✅ DISHWASHER SAFE: Here at Taylors Eye Witness, we like to make your life as easy as possible. That's why all of the tools available in our Sabatier Professional range are perfectly safe to clean in a dishwasher. They're equally easy to clean by hand as they're made from non-stick stainless steel or nylon. The garlic press has a removable plate enabling easy cleaning.

✅ BUILT TO LAST: At Taylors Eye Witness, we love to give value back and that's why every item in our Sabatier Professional range of kitchen is made to last. We're so confident in this that we offer a 25 YEAR GUARANTEE! The only kitchen tool you'll ever need!
description: Sabatier Professional Nylon headed serving and cooking spoon by Taylors Eye Witness We feel that we've designed the perfect dishing companion. This fashionable utensil is of sturdy construction, comfortable in your hand, weighted well to reduce hand fatigue during a repetitive task like spooning stews, casseroles, gravy or risotto. And most importantly, easy to clean due to the non-stick Nylon! You can rely on us, we have over 150 years experience in making and developing kitchen tools and you won't be disappointed with this one. Engineered for performance and built to last, and fashionably modern too! The strong, thick and inflexible non-scratch head is representative of the quality you've come to expect from our brand. Why not buy several pieces from the range to make up your own cooking arsenal? Or buy some for friends and family. They make the perfect wedding gift or moving in presents. SABATIER PROFESSIONAL products are the professional’s choice, with its roots in 19th Century Thiers, France, the SABATIER PROFESSIONAL brand represents uncompromising attention to detail using superior quality materials. This range includes a full complement of knives and kitchen accessories. Available in this range (sold separately): can opener garlic press peeler ladle non-scratch nylon turner stainless steel turner/burger flipper masher whisk spoon skimmer, mini sieve pizza wheel slotted turner grater & zester fish slice.
